sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70894" key="nifo/blhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νῐφό-βλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n70894.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὥρη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:429" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.429</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄκρα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:314" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.314</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
